_comment: Shared rare-drop table (spec §12), rolled by DropRoller.roll_tertiary on every kill. 'chance' is the per-kill gate to roll this table at all (1/64 ~= 0.0156); on a pass, one 'drops' entry is picked uniformly and its qty rolled between min..max. Gold is listed twice so it lands ~20% of pool hits. Items use legacy names like the per-enemy tables. This is the 'safe' pool (gold + broadly useful high-tier materials); add gear / pet / clue hooks in a later pass.
